meaning: n.乡绅,律师,侍从,大地主,治安官v.随侍,护卫
examples: One day, my master sold me to Squire Gordon.
In the village I just came from, the squire has had a pig stolen out of his sty.
One day in autumn, Squire Gordon went on a long journey, John went with him and I pulled the coach.
Squire formed his own band The Seahorses and has also forged a career as an artist.
Included in the archive are Andes, Big Fish Ensemble, Formal Script 421, Mephisto, Squire, and many more.
